market.label: tape-neutral
market.note: Tape neutral — indexes range-bound. Leaders: XLV, XLE, XLF. Sector XLE is leading.

vol.note: Market vol calm (VIXY 21.6, 5th pct) — stops can tighten.

cycle.note: Retail-crowded (Mon gap-chase / Fri OPEX & momentum) — fade whipsaws; favor taking profits.

ladder.scale_out: Take 50% @ T1 → stop to breakeven → run 50% to T2

entry_pullback.note: Limit: buy the retest of the broken level (now support); a hold/reclaim confirms.

duration.valid_until: expected ~9 days, valid up to ~22 days

time_stop.note: If neither stop nor target fills within ~22 days, the thesis has expired — exit at market.

entries.label: Now · market
entries.plain: Take it now at market — fastest fill, but the worst price of the three. Price is already extended from value (medium chase).

entries.label: Retest · broken level (breakup held)
entries.plain: The level already broke and is holding — wait to buy the retest of it (now support) at a better price.

decision.reason: Long S/R Breakout with a strong bullish tape (100.0); higher-TF bullish. Trigger and evidence agree.

decision.reason: Short S/R Bounce against a strong bullish tape (100.0); higher-TF bullish. Counter-trend — only valid with turn confirmation; size small, target the mean. Arms on: reclaim the last higher-low 35.98; volume ≥1.2× on the confirmation bar.

stop_preview.note: advisory preview — live stop unchanged (11b will anchor to structure)

missing.detail: rejection / reclaim candle in your direction

market.label: tape-neutral
market.note: Tape neutral — indexes range-bound. Leaders: XLV, XLE, XLF.

vol.note: Market vol calm (VIXY 21.6, 5th pct) — stops can tighten.

cycle.note: Retail-crowded (Mon gap-chase / Fri OPEX & momentum) — fade whipsaws; favor taking profits.

ladder.scale_out: Take 50% @ T1 → stop to breakeven → run 50% to T2

entry_pullback.label: Retest
entry_pullback.note: Limit: buy the retest of the broken level (now support); a hold/reclaim confirms.

ladder.scale_out: Take 50% @ T1 → stop to breakeven → run 50% to T2

duration.valid_until: expected ~11 days, valid up to ~28 days

time_stop.note: If neither stop nor target fills within ~28 days, the thesis has expired — exit at market.
